name: Mustard Fried Caribou
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the steaks with your salt and pepper.
2. Combine the mustard and horseradish in a small bowl.
3. Smear the mixture on each side of the steaks, ensuring they are fully coated on both sides.
4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Pan fry the steaks until browned and medium rare.
6. Probe a steak with a fork; when the juices run clear, the steaks are done.
